name: llm-space

metadata.name: llm-space
metadata.summary: A Python wrapper for managing OpenAI API and other LLM models.

documentation:
# LLM Tools

This package wraps the OpenAI API and other LLM models that share the completion endpoint feature. It provides a simple interface to generate text from a prompt.


## Installation

```bash
pip install llm-space
```


## Usage

```python
from llm_space.openai import prompt
from pathlib import Path


# Create a prompt object that will be logged to the `my-task` directory under the
# current working directory.
# The PromptZeros class will use arguments that will maximize the determinism of the outputs.
pz = prompt.PromptZeros(Path("./"), "my-task")

# Send a prompt to the API and return the response.
w = pz.send_prompt("What is the WDI code for GDP?", return_data=True)

# Print the response.
print(w)

# Output:

# {'message': [{'role': 'system', 'content': ''}, {'role': 'user', 'content': 'What is the WDI code for GDP?'}], 'response': {'id': 'chatcmpl-8V0IN0VbeYTrsBAohs309DHJQLJL8', 'choices': [{'finish_reason': 'stop', 'index': 0, 'message': {'content': 'The WDI code for GDP (Gross Domestic Product) is "NY.GDP.MKTP.CD".', 'role': 'assistant', 'function_call': None, 'tool_calls': None}}], 'created': 1702399995, 'model': 'gpt-3.5-turbo-0613', 'object': 'chat.completion', 'system_fingerprint': None, 'usage': {'completion_tokens': 23, 'prompt_tokens': 20, 'total_tokens': 43}}, 'content': 'The WDI code for GDP (Gross Domestic Product) is "NY.GDP.MKTP.CD".', 'api_kwargs': {'temperature': 0, 'top_p': 0, 'n': 1, 'stream': False, 'frequency_penalty': 0, 'presence_penalty': 0, 'model': 'gpt-3.5-turbo', 'max_tokens': 4029}, 'metadata': {}, 'message_hash': '1a5816095c232f29428d4cec70498391'}
```

NOTE: The output is also logged to the `my-task` directory under the current working directory.

modules.name: llm_space.openai.prompt
documentation:
This module contains the class that wraps the prompt to the OpenAI API.
The prompt classes are used to create a prompt for the GPT-3 model.
The `LoggedPrompt` class is the base class for all prompts.

classes.name: llm_space.openai.prompt.LoggedPrompt

methods.name: llm_space.openai.prompt.LoggedPrompt.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the LoggedPrompt class.
Args:
    payloads_dir (Path): The directory to store the payloads.
    task_label (str): The label for the task.
    model (str, optional): The GPT-3 model to use. Defaults to "gpt-3.5-turbo".
    total_tokens (int, optional): The total number of tokens to use. Defaults to 4050.
    api_kwargs (dict[str, Any], optional): The API arguments to use. Defaults to None.

methods.name: llm_space.openai.prompt.LoggedPrompt._clean_message
documentation: Clean the message to remove the tokens key.

methods.name: llm_space.openai.prompt.LoggedPrompt.calculate_prompt_tokens
documentation:
Calculate the number of tokens in the prompt.
Args:
    message (dict): The message to measure.
Returns:
    int: The number of tokens in the prompt.

methods.name: llm_space.openai.prompt.LoggedPrompt.build_message
documentation:
Build the message to send to the GPT-3 model.
Args:
    user_content (str): The user content to send to the GPT-3 model.
    user_template (str, optional): The template to use for the user content. Defaults to None.
    system_content (str, optional): The system content to send to the GPT-3 model. Defaults to None.
Returns:
    dict: The message to send to the GPT-3 model.

methods.name: llm_space.openai.prompt.LoggedPrompt.send_prompt
documentation:
Send the prompt to the GPT-3 model.

Args:
    message (list[dict[str, str]], optional): The message to send to the GPT-3 model. Defaults to None.
    user_content (str, optional): The user content to send to the GPT-3 model. Defaults to None.
    user_template (str, optional): The template to use for the user content. Defaults to None.
    system_content (str, optional): The system content to send to the GPT-3 model. Defaults to None.
    metadata (dict, optional): The metadata to save with the prompt. Defaults to None.
    api_kwargs (dict, optional): The API arguments to use. Defaults to None.
    return_data (bool, optional): Whether to return the data. Defaults to False.

Returns:
    dict: The data from the prompt.
Class for logging the prompts and responses from the GPT-3 model.

classes.name: llm_space.openai.prompt.PromptZeros

methods.name: llm_space.openai.prompt.PromptZeros.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the PromptZeros class.
Args:
    payloads_dir (Path): The directory to store the payloads.
    task_label (str): The label for the task.
    model (str, optional): The GPT-3 model to use. Defaults to "gpt-3.5-turbo".
    total_tokens (int, optional): The total number of tokens to use. Defaults to 4050.
    api_kwargs (dict[str, Any], optional): The API arguments to use. Defaults to None.
This class is used to send a prompt with all zero values for the API arguments. This is useful for reducing inderterminism in the model.

functions.name: llm_space.utils.num_tokens_from_messages
documentation: Returns the number of tokens used by a list of messages.

functions.name: llm_space.utils.get_message_hash
documentation: Returns a hash of the message.

modules.name: llm_space.exceptions
documentation: This module contains the exceptions used in the llm_space package.

functions.name: llm_space.parser.parse_misparsed
documentation:
Parse misparsed JSON.
Args:
    text (str): The text to parse.
    open (str, optional): The open character. Defaults to None.
    close (str, optional): The close character. Defaults to None.
Returns:
    JSON: The parsed JSON.
